predictions.description: One prediction pins the whole mutation sequence, because every action leaves its mark in the final serialization: xml-new adds the XML declaration; <settings> was inserted as root child (empty anchor); <timeout> inserted under it with text then UPDATED 30→60; <first/> was inserted Before settings and then DELETED (absence is its witness); <last/> sits after settings (After position); the createIfNotExists update built the audit/enabled chain relative to root (appended last, AFTER <last/>); set-attribute put version="2" on the root; childless elements serialize self-closed.
xml-close-document replaces the XmlDocument wrapper with an empty string (the snapshot in finalXml was taken before the close).
